See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 38730 => 'Central Bosnia Canton', 38731 => 'Posavina Canton', 38732 => 'Zenica-Doboj Canton', 38733 => 'Sarajevo Canton', 38734 => 'Canton 10', 38735 => 'Tuzla Canton', 38736 => 'Herzegovina-Neretva Canton', 38737 => 'Una-Sana Canton', 38738 => 'Bosnian-Podrinje Canton Goražde', 38739 => 'West Herzegovina Canton', 3874 => 'Brčko District', 38750 => 'Mrkonjić Grad', 38751 => 'Banja Luka', 38752 => 'Prijedor', 38753 => 'Doboj', 38754 => 'Šamac', 38755 => 'Bijeljina', 38756 => 'Zvornik', 38757 => 'East Sarajevo', 38758 => 'Foča', 38759 => 'Trebinje', ];
